name: morphly-voice
description: Morphly Voice desktop dashboard with RVC and Beatrice V2 engine support.

scripts.dashboard:typecheck: npm run typecheck:static --prefix Morphly-Voice-Dashboard && npm run typecheck:api --prefix Morphly-Voice-Dashboard
scripts.build:docker: date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S > docker/dummy && DOCKER_BUILDKIT=1 docker build -f docker/Dockerfile docker/ -t voice-changer
scripts.build:docker:onnx: DOCKER_BUILDKIT=1 docker build -f docker_onnx/Dockerfile docker/ -t onnx-converter
scripts.build:docker:trainer: date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S > docker_trainer/dummy && DOCKER_BUILDKIT=1 docker build -f docker_trainer/Dockerfile docker_trainer/ -t trainer
scripts.build:docker:vcclient: date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S > docker_vcclient/dummy && DOCKER_BUILDKIT=1 docker build -f docker_vcclient/Dockerfile docker_vcclient/ -t vcclient
